resources.string: Enter the value you want to convert
Makes it easy to convert to US units

US Unit Converter is a practical application that helps you convert various common units into units used in the United States quickly and accurately.

Designed with a simple and easy-to-use interface, this application is suitable for everyday needs—from studying and cooking to understanding measurements in international references.

1. Inch (in): Inch is a unit of length in the US system commonly used for screen sizes such as phones, TVs, and laptops.

2. Feet (ft): Feet is a larger unit of length than inches and is commonly used to measure height, building height, or room height.

3. Pound (lb): Pound is a unit of weight in the US system used for body weight or food ingredients.

4. Gallon (gal): Gallon is a unit of liquid volume commonly used for fuel (gasoline), beverages, or other liquids.
